name: Kapernschnitzel (Veal Cutlets with Capers)
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces Veal Cutlets (4 at 6 ounces each)
2 ounces Capers, drained (from half a small jar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle cutlets with lemon juice and season with salt, pepper, and paprika.
2. Heat oil in a frying pan.
3. Fry the cutlets for 3 minutes on one side.
4. Turn the cutlets over and add the drained capers to the pan.
5. Continue frying for another 3 minutes; then remove the cutlets and place them on a preheated serving platter.
6. Pour the wine into the pan, scraping any brown particles from the bottom of the pan.
7. Add the bay leaf and simmer the liquid for 3 minutes.
8. Remove the bay leaf and blend in the evaporated milk to adjust seasonings.
9. Pour the sauce over the cutlets.
10. Cut beets into strips and arrange them on lettuce leaves as a garnish.
